creator: ah@linux-hq.de
text:
Port does not make any sense any more. (NWN2 is out there)

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    ah@linux-hq.de
 COMMENT=       A tool for monitoring Neverwinter Nights Server with mrtg
+DEPRECATED=    Does not make any sense any more. (NWN 2 is out there)
+EXPIRATION_DATE=       2006-12-31

 PLIST_FILES=   bin/nwnusers--mkWPqJxAp3wufYMb5XNFzJXG8uypFW9uzEPxY3aAj8yqpOFI
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN nwnusers.orig/Makefile nwnusers/Makefile
--- nwnusers.orig/Makefile      Fri Feb  6 14:11:20 2004
+++ nwnusers/Makefile   Wed Dec 13 20:52:57 2006
@@ -13,6 +13,8 @@
